title: Öz Hakiki Karakol: Asayis Berkemal Aga...
overview: Hasan, a con artist who has just been released from prison, goes to convince Kuzey Baba, who has renounced his life of crime, to help him carry out his robbery plan with his incompetent neighborhood friends. The young men, who are burning with the desire to get rich quick, suddenly find themselves at a village police station as police officers.
